column1: # Times are always in IST (Asia/Kolkata) — the code converts device localtime → IST.
# start_ist / end_ist: HH:MM (24h). Overnight slots wrap midnight (e.g. 23:30–05:30).
# p1–p4: yahoo_symbol from market_config.csv. Shown left→right in ticker.
# 05:30–09:00  Pre-open: Asia-Pacific setting the tone for Indian open
# Note: GIFT NIFTY not listed on Yahoo Finance; ^NSEI used as proxy with label override
# 09:00–15:30  Core NSE equity session + MCX Gold live
# 19:30–23:30  US core equity + MCX metals peak
# 01:30–12:30 IST  Overnight & Asia session (before LSE opens ~12:30 IST / 08:00 BST)
# 19:00–21:00 IST  LSE + NYSE overlap (09:30 ET open
# 01:30–05:30 IST  Overnight: all major markets closed
